name: production-hardening
description: CI, container image, and verify-page smoke tests for Singulr
goals: Regression tests for the public verify page

requirements.description: Add GitHub Actions workflow that runs pytest, ruff, and hardhat compile on push and pull_request
acceptance: Workflow runs .venv pytest -q, ruff check singulr tests orchestrator, and npm run compile
Workflow passes on current main branch code

test.description: Add tests/test_ci_workflow.py that asserts ci.yml exists and references pytest and ruff

implement.description: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with cache for pip and npm

requirements.description: Add production Dockerfile and document docker run in README
acceptance: Dockerfile builds uvicorn app on port 8000
README has a Docker section with build and run commands
Image does not bake in .env secrets

test.description: Add tests/test_dockerfile.py checking Dockerfile exists and uses multi-stage or slim python base

implement.description: Create Dockerfile and optional docker-compose.prod.yml service profile

requirements.description: Add API smoke tests for /verify HTML and static assets

test.description: Write failing tests/test_verify_page.py using FastAPI TestClient

implement.description: Fix any static routing gaps so tests pass without changing verification logic
